fixed_source: m=blackjack;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=evaluate(hand:$str):$i64{let total=mut.0;let aces=mut.0;let cards=s.split(hand;" ");lp(let idx=0;idx<cards.len();idx=idx+1){let card=cards.get(idx);let value=mut.0;if(card="J"){value=10}el{if(card="Q"){value=10}el{if(card="K"){value=10}el{if(card="A"){value=11;aces=aces+1}el{value=s.toint(card)}}}};total=total+value};lp(total>21){if(aces>0){total=total-10;aces=aces-1}el{<total}};<total};f=main():$i64{let line=s.trim(io.readln());let total=evaluate(line);if(total>21){io.println(s.concat(s.fromint(total);" Bust"))}el{io.println(s.concat(s.fromint(total);" Safe"))};<0}
